archetype: Performance Pro (Archetype 2 - Adapted for Light Mode)

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black tracking-tight leading-none uppercase

rules: Use tight letter spacing for headings.
Overlines and small labels MUST be uppercase with wide spacing tracking-[0.2em].
Use Barlow Condensed for all workout names, days, and major numeric stats.
Use Manrope for instructional text, history logs, and secondary details.
Keep the interface overwhelmingly white and light grey (clean card-based).
Use pure zinc-950 for primary text to ensure high contrast.
Accent color (blue-600) should be reserved for primary actions (Start Workout, Add Set) and active tab states.
Never use pure black or grey without a slight tint (using zinc which has a subtle cool/blue undertone).

spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto h-screen bg-white shadow-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col relative
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-2xl for primary cards, rounded-xl for inner elements, rounded-full for buttons/pills
spacing_and_layout.grids: Use flex-col with gap-4 or gap-6 for vertical lists. Use grid-cols-2 gap-4 for split stats.
rules: Maintain a mobile-first layout (simulate a mobile app wrapper if viewed on desktop).
Cards should use 1px borders (border-zinc-200) instead of heavy shadows for that clean 'Lyfta' look.
Use sticky headers for the active workout or navigation.

components.buttons: rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-wider h-12 flex items-center justify-center transition-transform active:scale-95
components.tabs: flex p-1 bg-zinc-100 rounded-lg. Active tab: bg-white shadow-sm text-zinc-950 rounded-md. Inactive tab: text-zinc-500
components.inputs: bg-zinc-50 border-transparent focus:border-blue-600 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100 rounded-xl h-12 px-4
components.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md bg-white border-t border-zinc-200 pb-safe pt-2 px-6 flex justify-between items-center z-50
rules: Use Shadcn primitives but heavily customize classes to remove default Vercel-look.
Exercise library should have a search bar and muscle group filter pills (horizontal scrollable).
Workout Calendar: Use Shadcn Calendar, style it flat without shadows, blue indicator for workout days.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle background darken (hover:bg-zinc-100) or border color change.
motion_and_interactions.active_states: Scale down (active:scale-95) for primary buttons and list items to mimic native mobile feel.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Slide up for modals/exercise details, standard opacity fade for tabs.
rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='start-workout-button').

icons.sizing: w-6 h-6 for nav, w-5 h-5 for inline icons
icons.stroke_width: 2.5 for a bolder, more athletic feel matching the font

image_urls.description: Person about to lift barbell. Use for empty states, welcome screen, or auth screen background.
Athletic young man performing a snatch lift. Use as a placeholder for exercise detail GIF/video area.
Topless man in black shorts carrying black dumbbell. Use for workout routine cover images.

rules: Use placeholder images from this list if an exercise GIF is not available dynamically.
Images should have a very subtle dark gradient overlay at the bottom if text needs to sit on them (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent).

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a responsive web app that acts and feels like a native mobile app (React Native Expo equivalent in React web for this environment).
Implement a main container with 'max-w-md mx-auto h-screen relative flex flex-col bg-zinc-50' to restrict desktop view to mobile proportions.
Implement Google Auth + JWT flow as requested. Provide a clean login screen using the provided Hero image.
For the Exercise detail page: Use a large hero area for the image/GIF, followed by a rounded-t-3xl white sheet that pulls up over it containing the tabs (About, History, Progress).
Implement the 'About' tab to show primary/secondary muscles and instructions.
Implement the 'History' tab with a clean list of past sets/reps.
Implement a 'Similar Exercises' horizontal scroll list at the bottom of the detail page.
For the workout planner, integrate a Calendar view using Shadcn, allowing users to pick a date and assign a routine.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to every button, tab, and input.

Use 'Barlow Condensed' for headings. You may need to import it via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS (@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@600;700;800;900&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');).
Strictly follow the color palette: white cards, zinc-50 backgrounds, zinc-200 borders, blue-600 primary accents, zinc-950 high-contrast text.
